steps.title: Use plural nonpossessive forms
steps.content: The sentence needs a plural noun for the Navajo Nation artists who developed the weaving style and a plain plural time expression, over 160 years ago. Neither word needs a possessive apostrophe.

steps.title: Reject apostrophe errors
steps.content: Choice A uses singular possessive artist's and possessive year's. Choice B correctly has plural artists but wrongly uses possessive years'. Choice C wrongly makes artists possessive. The version with artists and years as plain plural forms is grammatical. The answer is D.
